phases.name: label-expansion
details: Goal: Expand labeled dataset to 400 rows with leakage-safe dedupe, QA gates, stable IDs, and labeling rubric.

details: Goal: Deliver leakage-safe label expansion tooling, rubric, and QA gates for a 400-row target dataset.

phases.name: label-expansion
details: Goal: Resume Phase 1 execution with director runbooks on top of existing label-expansion outputs.

phases.name: director-foundation
details: Goal: Build reusable autonomous director package that turns roadmap/protocol/iteration history into executable runbooks with gate checks and blocker escalation.

details: Goal: Implement autonomous planning/execution director in parallel with Iteration 1 science branches.

phases.name: stabilization-main-director-i1
details: Goal: Merge director foundation and useful Iteration 1 code/docs into a stable main-ready branch while deferring unresolved science blockers correctly.

phases.name: stabilization-main-director-i1
details: Goal: Stabilize main-bound branch with director and Iteration 1 code/docs while preserving truthful blocker semantics.

global_gates: IRR gate: Cohen's kappa >= 0.6 before retraining.
Held-out gate: accuracy >= 0.80 on canonical evaluation.
Leakage gate: held-out split excluded from centroid computation and threshold tuning.
Reproducibility gate: artifact metadata includes commit hash, parameters, and input fingerprints.
risk_lines: R1 label ambiguity between Actionable vs Speculative.
R5 silent file skips / partial output batches.
R6 label mapping or centroid metadata mismatch.
R7 scope creep from hardening before science gates.
R6 correction logged: canonical centroid artifact in repo is `data/validation/centroids_mpnet.json` (not `centroids.mpnet.json`).
R5 risk observed (potential silent partials) during timeout scenarios.
R3 leakage risk confirmed by overlap diagnostics between labeled base and held-out.
R2 class imbalance remained after leakage-safe sampling.
R3 leakage prevented via hard exclusion, reducing available sample volume.
R7 scope control maintained (no retraining/calibration introduced).
R2 class-balance and sample-size gate remains failed.
last_successful_gate: unresolved Phase 1 dataset size/class-balance gate remains deferred; not marked pass.
